'''Chipr''' was the name given to a group of two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] owned by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] that carried troops away from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] following the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] oversaw their exit from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockade.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}
